message:
test(fcp-core): pin ReadinessDescriptor constructors + status-folding + serde shape (flywheel_connectors-gmw4e)

Bead asks for ConnectorReadiness Display + serde pinning. No type
literally named ConnectorReadiness exists in fcp-core; the closest
readiness-shaped struct is ReadinessDescriptor at
connector_descriptors.rs:546 — shared readiness metadata used during
connector bring-up + runtime health. ReadinessDescriptor is a struct
(not enum) with no Display impl; its "Display" surface is the
embedded status: DescriptorStatus + summary string + nested
SelfCheckReport/ReadinessResponse/ConnectorHealth.

No prior test pins ReadinessDescriptor.

Coverage: 6-field JSON shape (status required; summary/health/
self_check/readiness skip-when-None; checks skip-when-empty),
unverifiable + not_yet_measured constructors, from_self_check
projection (ok→Ready no check, failed→Failed+check, degraded→
Degraded+check), from_readiness_response aggregation (Ready iff
ready=true AND every component ready, else Failed; checks sorted
by id; vacuous-truth empty-components case). Loud
status-vs-summary-divergence sentinel: status combines ready AND
component flags but summary tracks ONLY ready — a "ready=true with
failing components" payload yields Failed aggregate status with a
misleading "Connector reported ready." summary (intentional per
source connector_descriptors.rs:625 vs :654; pin so a future
"fix" that re-aligns the two without updating phrasing is caught).
with_health folds via DescriptorStatus::combine (rank arithmetic),
with_health summary-fallback only when None, with_check appends
+ folds, JSON+CBOR round-trip, embedded DescriptorStatus snake_case
wire form per status.

19 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-gmw4e cargo test -p
fcp-core --test connector_readiness_display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
